metadata.title: ANOUANZÊ ERP — The ERP for African NGOs and associations
metadata.description: Drive your impact. Run your organisation with excellence. A complete, SYCEBNL-compliant ERP for associations, NGOs and non-profit organisations across Africa.
metadata.keywords: NGO ERP, association software, SYCEBNL, OHADA, NGO management Africa, non-profit accounting, NGO software Côte d'Ivoire
metadata.ogTitle: ANOUANZÊ ERP — The ERP for African NGOs and associations
metadata.ogDescription: An all-in-one management solution for associations, NGOs and non-profit organisations. SYCEBNL compliant · OHADA standard.

infoBar.trial: 30-day free trial · No credit card required

problems.subtitle: Every NGO faces the same challenges. ANOUANZÊ ERP removes them one by one.

items.before: Multiple separate Excel files and paper registers
items.after: All data centralised and available in real time

items.before: Donor reports produced manually over several days
items.after: Reports generated automatically in a few minutes
Built-in OHADA chart of accounts, audits made simple
Centralised MEAL dashboard by project and indicator

items.before: Paper-based HR management, frequent payroll errors
No real-time visibility on cash position
items.after: Balances, flows and forecasts visible at any time

benefits.subtitle: Measurable results from the very first weeks of use.

items.title: Save time
items.desc: Automate repetitive tasks: reminders, reports, payslips.

items.title: Steer with precision
items.desc: Key indicators, dashboards and real-time alerts.

items.title: Reduce errors
items.desc: Enter data once, automatic calculations, built-in controls.

items.title: Secure your data
items.desc: Role-based access, daily backups, encrypted connections.

items.title: Simplify audits
items.desc: Full traceability, action history, built-in audit trail.

items.title: Work anywhere
items.desc: Web, mobile, tablet — accessible from any device.

modules.subtitle: A complete ecosystem of modules designed for the reality of African NGOs and associations.

items.title: Governance
items.desc: General assemblies, resolutions, mandates, governing bodies. Your entire institutional machinery, digitised.

items.title: Members & Dues
items.desc: Complete register, dues tracking, automatic reminders, membership history.

items.title: Donors & Funders
items.desc: A CRM dedicated to individual donors and institutional funders. Track gifts and agreements.

items.title: Projects & MEAL
items.desc: Planning, logical framework, monitoring indicators, evaluation and automated donor reports.

items.title: Human Resources
items.desc: Employees, volunteers, contracts, leave, payslips compliant with Ivorian law.

items.title: SYCEBNL Accounting
items.desc: Built-in OHADA chart of accounts, journals, entries, trial balance, compliant financial statements.

items.title: Budget & Treasury
items.desc: Budget planning per project, bank reconciliation, cash-flow forecasts.

items.title: Procurement & Stock
items.desc: Purchase orders, suppliers, goods receipt, real-time field stock management.

items.title: Documents
items.desc: Built-in document management, filing by project/funder, e-signatures, versioning.

items.title: Events
items.desc: Organisational calendar, invitations, attendance, automatic minutes.

items.title: Reports & BI
items.desc: Real-time dashboards, Excel/PDF exports, donor reports in one click.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.desc: Ask your questions in plain language and get instant analyses, reports and recommendations.

audiences.subtitle: ANOUANZÊ ERP adapts to the size and sector of every organisation.

items.title: Health NGOs
items.desc: Community health, nutrition, HIV/AIDS, water and sanitation.

items.title: Education NGOs
items.desc: Literacy, scholarships, training centres, community schools.

items.title: Agricultural NGOs
items.desc: Rural development, cooperatives, agricultural value chains.

items.title: Local associations
items.desc: Women's and youth groups, neighbourhood, cultural and sports associations.

items.title: Faith-based organisations
items.desc: Parishes, dioceses, non-profit faith institutions.

items.title: Networks & federations
items.desc: National federations, multi-country networks, coordination bodies.

steps.title: Up and running in 3 steps
steps.subtitle: From sign-up to your first accounting close, our team supports you at every step.

items.title: Create your workspace
items.desc: Register your organisation in 5 minutes. Our team configures your workspace and imports your existing data.

items.title: Set up your modules
items.desc: Activate only the modules you need. Configure your chart of accounts, your projects, your members.

items.title: Drive your impact
items.desc: Access real-time dashboards, generate your reports and make better decisions.

sara.desc: SARA is available 24/7 to answer all your questions about ANOUANZÊ ERP, guide you through the features and help you pick the right plan.
features: Introduces the software and its features
Compares plans and points you to the right one
Guides you to the free trial and the demo
Escalates to a human advisor when needed

sara.chatUser: What is the difference between the Pro and Starter plans?

security.subtitle: The security of your data is our absolute priority.

items.title: Encrypted connections
items.desc: SSL/TLS on every communication between your browser and our servers.

items.title: Role-based access
items.desc: 11 permission levels. Each user only sees what they are allowed to see.

items.title: Daily backups
items.desc: Your data is backed up automatically every night. Restore available on request.

items.title: Full audit trail
items.desc: Every action is logged: who did what, when and from where. Ideal for audits.

pwa.desc: Reach your workspace faster from your computer, tablet or smartphone — without going through an app store.
features: An icon on your home screen
Works with Android, Windows, Chrome, Edge
pwa.iphoneNote: On iPhone: Share → Add to Home Screen

pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes hosting, updates and support. No hidden fees.
pricing.taxNote: All prices are excluding tax. VAT applies according to local regulations.

essentiel.name: Essential
essentiel.desc: For small groups and emerging associations

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For structured associations and local NGOs

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For active NGOs with projects and teams

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For networks, federations and large NGOs

ibig.subtitle: IBIG SOFT designs solutions built for African realities, from Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire.

items.title: Built for Africa
items.desc: Adapted to the tax, regulatory and operational realities of African organisations.

items.title: Continuous updates
items.desc: Regulatory changes and new features delivered automatically at no extra cost.

items.title: Training included
items.desc: Onboarding support, guides, video tutorials and dedicated support.

items.title: Secure data
items.desc: Secure infrastructure, encryption, role-based access control and backups.

items.title: Multi-device
items.desc: Computer, tablet, smartphone — plus PWA installation for instant access.

items.title: Responsive support
items.desc: The IBIG SOFT team is available by email, phone and WhatsApp depending on your plan.

testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.subtitle: Organisations across West Africa use ANOUANZÊ ERP every day.

items.name: Aminata Coulibaly
items.text: ANOUANZÊ ERP has transformed the way we report to our funders. Financial reports are now generated in minutes, instead of several days.

items.name: Kouassi Brou
items.text: SYCEBNL compliance was our main challenge during audits. With ANOUANZÊ, our accounting is perfectly structured from the start. Our auditors are impressed.

items.name: Fatou Diallo
items.text: The MEAL module lets us track our indicators in real time. Producing reports for our technical and financial partners has become a genuine pleasure.

items.name: Jean-Baptiste Kouamé
items.text: We manage 28 employees and 12 projects at the same time. ANOUANZÊ ERP gives us a consolidated, real-time view. Indispensable for our organisation.

items.name: Mariam Sanogo
items.text: As a small association, the Essential plan is more than enough for us. Simple interface, quick training. Our treasurer was up and running in less than a day.

items.name: Dr. Sékou Traoré
items.text: The AI assistant is stunning. It generates analyses of our financial data in plain language. A real time-saver for our steering meetings.

partners.desc: Join the IBIG partnership programme for free and recommend our solutions to your network. Access the tools, track your referrals and earn your commissions.
partners.disclaimer: No guaranteed income is promised. Commissions vary according to the programme's terms.

items.a: Yes. Your data is hosted on secure servers with SSL encryption, automatic daily backups and role-restricted access. You remain the owner of your data at all times.

items.q: Can I change plan at any time?
items.a: Absolutely. You can upgrade immediately (billed pro rata). Downgrading to a lower plan is possible at the end of the period.

items.q: Is there a free trial period?
items.a: Yes, a 30-day free trial with no credit card for the Starter and Pro plans. The Essential plan comes with a 14-day trial.

items.q: Does the software work without an internet connection?
items.a: ANOUANZÊ ERP is a web application, so an internet connection is required. We recommend a minimum connection of 1 Mbps for optimal use.

items.q: How does migrating my existing data work?
items.a: Our team supports you in importing your data (Excel, CSV, legacy software). This service is included in the Pro and Enterprise plans, and optional for the others.

items.q: Is it compliant with African accounting standards?
items.a: Yes. ANOUANZÊ ERP implements the OHADA SYCEBNL framework (accounting system for non-profit entities), in force in 17 African countries.
Initial training is included in every plan (2 hours online). Advanced on-site training is available as an option. The Enterprise plan includes complete training.

items.q: Can I use ANOUANZÊ ERP on mobile?
items.a: Yes. The web interface is fully responsive and adapts to smartphones and tablets. You can also install it as an app from your browser (PWA).

help.title: IBIG SOFT Help Centre
help.desc: User guides, video tutorials, technical documentation and human assistance available depending on your plan.

finalCta.subtitle: Try ANOUANZÊ ERP, request a demo or chat with SARA right away.
